task_completion.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog SEO Spider application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the target URL to crawl
task_completion.visual_evidence: The URL 'https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links' (or its working variants ending in '_internal' or '_external') is typed into the 'Enter URL to spider' address bar at the top of the application.

task_completion.description: Run the crawl on the target website
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window is populated with crawled URLs from crawler-test.com, and the progress bar indicates crawling activity or completion.

task_completion.description: Identify at least one 404 client error
task_completion.visual_evidence: The results table shows at least one row with a '404' in the 'Status Code' column, OR the 'Client Error (4xx)' tab/filter is actively selected showing results.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export of the client error (4xx) report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export' button is clicked while viewing the 4xx errors, or the 'Bulk Export' > 'Response Codes' > 'Client Error (4xx) Inlinks' menu is open.

task_completion.description: Save the exported report to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box is visible showing the file name 'broken_links.csv' and the destination folder '/home/ga/Documents/', or a file manager/terminal confirms the file exists at this exact path.

integrity.description: Agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show interaction with the Screaming Frog SEO Spider graphical interface, not terminal commands (like curl or wget) being used to find broken links.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file must be saved via Screaming Frog's native export dialogs. The agent should not be seen manually typing out a CSV file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent crawled the actual requested domain
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs visible in the Screaming Frog results pane must belong to the 'crawler-test.com' domain, proving the agent didn't mock the results using a local or different site.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected status code for the broken links is 404. The exact target URL 'https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links' returns a 404 itself. The agent may use 'https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links_internal' or 'https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links_external' to find the actual broken links. Accept these variations as valid target URLs.
